notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 25-29 in generated discovery row order.

geas::choice_or_mode.issue: The command can be any service, restraint, or course of activity short of certain death; runtime preserves this only in prose and lacks typed command-choice constraints.
geas::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add geas-style command fields for allowed command scope, forbidden certain-death commands, and suicidal-command ending.
geas::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandConstraint data with forbidden-command and spell-ending behavior.

geas::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Wisdom save and failed-save Charmed condition are represented in structured fields and runtime STATUS_CONDITION. The command-violation damage remains tracked under status/control buckets.
geas::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new initial-save field required for this pass.
geas::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Wisdom save plus Charmed STATUS_CONDITION.

geas::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Geas's cannot-understand-command automatic success rule is now encoded as a save auto-outcome override.
geas::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Save Auto Outcome auto_success with condition cannot_understand_caster.
geas::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime condition.saveOutcomeOverrides carrying cannot_understand_caster -> auto_success.

geas::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary visible target selection and verbal command delivery; visible targeting is represented by lineOfSight, and no separate light/sound effect is created.
geas::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No vision-light-sound field required for this pass.
geas::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by lineOfSight targeting and verbal component.

geas::message_or_communication.issue: The command must be understood by the target, but runtime has no structured command-language or comprehension fields.
geas::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add command communication fields for verbal command content and target understanding requirement.

geas::summon_or_controlled_entity.issue: The target is not summoned, but it is behaviorally constrained by a command and penalized for acting counter to it; runtime lacks geas/control-obligation fields.
geas::summon_or_controlled_entity.recommendedTemplateChange: Track this under a control-obligation field family rather than summon fields.

geas::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The Charmed target's behavior is constrained by a socially framed command, including service/refrain choices and understanding requirements; runtime lacks typed social-control semantics.
geas::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-control command fields for compelled service or abstention.

geas::healing_or_restoration.issue: Remove Curse, Greater Restoration, or Wish can end the spell; runtime lacks typed external-spell removal/ending fields.
geas::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add removableBySpell fields listing spells that can end a spell effect.

geas::status_or_state_change.issue: Runtime represents the Charmed condition but not the once-per-day 5d10 Psychic damage when the Charmed target acts directly counter to the command.
geas::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add command-violation damage fields with once-per-day frequency.
geas::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditional violationDamage data keyed to command noncompliance.

geas::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched prose about a course of activity, but Geas does not create or alter terrain, light, weather, or another environmental state.

geas::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends on suicidal commands and can be ended by specific spells; runtime lacks typed conditional ending fields for both cases.
geas::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for forbidden command endings and external spell removal.

hallow::choice_or_mode.issue: Hallow has chosen creature types plus a chosen extra effect with many modes; runtime keeps the mode set as prose only.
hallow::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area ward mode fields for creature-type choices and extra-effect options.
hallow::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hallowModes data for ward type selection and extra effects.

hallow::vision_light_sound.issue: Darkness, Daylight, and Silence are separate light/sound area modes; runtime has no typed light-blocking, bright-light, darkness-countering, or silence data.
hallow::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area light/sound mode fields with magical-light level interactions and silence ingress/egress rules.

hallow::message_or_communication.issue: Tongues lets selected creatures communicate with any other creature in the area despite language barriers; runtime lacks typed area communication fields.
hallow::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area communication mode fields for universal in-area communication.

hallow::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Hallowed Ward blocks chosen creature types from willingly entering and suppresses possession/Charmed/Frightened from those types; runtime lacks typed ward-entry and ward-suppression fields.
hallow::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward-entry restriction and ward-status-suppression fields.

hallow::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Extradimensional Interference blocks selected creatures from entering or exiting the area using teleportation or interplanar travel; runtime lacks typed travel-prevention fields.
hallow::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area travel-block fields for teleportation and interplanar travel.

hallow::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The ward and Tongues modes affect social control and communication in the area, but runtime lacks typed social/communication mode data.
hallow::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-area mode fields for warded creature types and universal communication.

hallow::status_or_state_change.issue: Hallow can prevent Frightened, impose Frightened, suppress Charmed/Frightened/possessed states from warded creatures, and prevent dead bodies from becoming Undead; runtime lacks typed status-prevention/status-application/body-state fields.
hallow::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area status prevention, status application, possession suppression, and corpse-state protection fields.

hallow::damage_reduction_or_prevention.issue: Resistance and Vulnerability modes alter damage taken by selected creatures for a chosen damage type; runtime lacks typed area resistance/vulnerability mode data.
hallow::damage_reduction_or_prevention.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area resistance/vulnerability mode fields with chosen damage type.
hallow::damage_reduction_or_prevention.reviewerNote: Closed by adding neutral Damage Interaction fields and effects[].damageInteraction. Hallow now records resistance and vulnerability as area-bound chosen-type modes for chosen creature types while those creatures are in the area.

hold-monster::choice_or_mode.issue: The detector matched ordinary target selection; one visible creature is already represented by targeting and lineOfSight.

hold-monster::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save and negates-condition outcome are now represented in structured fields and runtime STATUS_CONDITION.
hold-monster::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by saveType Wisdom and saveEffect negates_condition.

hold-monster::repeat_save_or_recurring_c.issue: The end-of-turn repeat Wisdom save is now represented in runtime repeatSave data.
hold-monster::repeat_save_or_recurring_c.recommendedTemplateChange: No new repeat-save field required for this pass.

hold-monster::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

hold-monster::status_or_state_change.issue: The Paralyzed condition, duration, save gate, and repeat-save ending are now represented in runtime.
hold-monster::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION Paralyzed with repeatSave.

holy-weapon::choice_or_mode.issue: The dismiss burst affects each creature of the caster's choice that the caster can see within 30 feet of the weapon; runtime now has burst effects but lacks a secondary chosen-creature targeting surface centered on the weapon.
holy-weapon::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add secondary-effect targeting fields for chosen visible creatures around an affected object.
holy-weapon::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime secondaryTargeting data for the dismiss burst.

holy-weapon::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save, half-damage success result, and negated Blinded condition are now represented by separate runtime DAMAGE and STATUS_CONDITION effects.
holy-weapon::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by burst DAMAGE and Blinded STATUS_CONDITION effects.

holy-weapon::repeat_save_or_recurring_ch.issue: The Blinded creature's end-of-turn Constitution repeat save is now represented in runtime repeatSave data.
holy-weapon::repeat_save_or_recurring_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: No new repeat-save field required for this pass.

holy-weapon::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The optional bonus-action dismissal is now represented as a granted action and as the trigger for the burst effects.
holy-weapon::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No new sustain-action field required for this pass.
holy-weapon::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by grantedActions plus on_caster_action effects.

holy-weapon::vision_light_sound.issue: The weapon's bright and dim light are now represented as a typed light utility effect; the visibility requirement for burst target choice remains tracked under choice_or_mode.
holy-weapon::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional light field required for this pass.
holy-weapon::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by utilityType light and light radii.

holy-weapon::status_or_state_change.issue: The Blinded condition, one-minute duration, save gate, and repeat-save ending are now represented in runtime.
holy-weapon::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Blinded STATUS_CONDITION with repeatSave.

holy-weapon::conditional_ending.issue: The spell lasts for its normal concentration duration unless the caster uses the one-time bonus-action dismissal now represented in runtime.
holy-weapon::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No new conditional-ending field required for this pass.
holy-weapon::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration/concentration plus dismiss grantedAction.

greater-restoration.title: Healing And Restoration Mechanics
greater-restoration.canonicalEvidence: You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it: 1 Exhaustion level / The Charmed or Petrified condition / A curse, including the target's Attunement to a cursed magic item / Any reduction to one of the target's ability scores / Any reduction to the target's Hit Point maximum.
greater-restoration.structuredState: Effect Type: HEALING; Utility Type: other
greater-restoration.jsonState: Runtime has one UTILITY other prose effect and no typed restoration/removal data.
greater-restoration.issue: Greater Restoration's restoration choices are flattened into prose; runtime cannot distinguish Exhaustion removal, condition removal, curse/attunement removal, ability-score restoration, or hit-point-maximum restoration.
greater-restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration-removal fields for exhaustion levels, named conditions, curses including cursed-item attunement, ability-score reductions, and hit-point-maximum reductions.
greater-restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restorationOptions data with one schema-safe option per removable effect family.

greater-restoration.title: Choices And Modes
greater-restoration.canonicalEvidence: You touch a creature and magically remove one of the following effects from it.
greater-restoration.structuredState: No structured choice field; Description lists the options.
greater-restoration.jsonState: Runtime has one prose UTILITY effect with the option list.
greater-restoration.issue: The caster chooses one restoration option, but the structured and runtime layers do not expose the option set as data.
greater-restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restorationOptions choices and selected-option prompt support if needed.
